content.json:
## Thain Feedback Metrics
 Feedback signals captured from v1.1.

content.title: Feedback Volume + Override Rate (Daily)
content.query:
let base = dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name == "thain.trace"
| where tostring(customDimensions["thain.feedback.submitted"]) == "true"
| extend decision = tostring(customDimensions["thain.feedback.decision"])
| summarize feedback_count=count(), rejected=countif(decision in ("rejected", "overridden")) by day=bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend override_rate = iif(feedback_count == 0, 0.0, todouble(rejected) / todouble(feedback_count) * 100.0);
base
| project day, metric="feedback_count", value=todouble(feedback_count)
| union (base | project day, metric="override_rate", value=todouble(override_rate))
| order by day asc
| render timechart

content.title: Top Feedback Reasons
content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name == "thain.trace"
| where tostring(customDimensions["thain.feedback.submitted"]) == "true"
| extend reason = tostring(customDimensions["thain.feedback.reason"])
| where reason != ""
| summarize count() by reason
| top 10 by count_ desc
